# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio
spec:
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2048Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 4096Mi
    ingressGateways:
    - name: istio-ingressgateway
      enabled: true
      k8s:
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
      security:
        disabled: true
    pilot:
      configMap: true
      env:
        ISTIO_META_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      enableNamespacesByDefault: true
    telemetry:
      v2:
        prometheus:
          configMap: true
          disableHostHeaderValidation: true
    meshConfig:
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        concurrency: 2
        statsConfig:
          statsTags:
          - name: cluster_name
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: service
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: version
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: pod_name
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: namespace
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: node_name
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: istio_component
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: istio_version
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: istio_proxy_type
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: istio_proxy_version
            tagValue:
              literal:
                value: istio-proxy
          - name: istio_proxy_cluster
            tagValue:
              literal:

          - name: istio_proxy_zone
            tagValue:
